codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly extracts image payloads from the WebSocket connection, safely decodes the base64 content, and puts it in the video_input_queue for the Gemini Session. A unit test was correctly provided.

issues.description: Test uses a synchronous `time.sleep(2.5)` which blocks the thread and slows down the test suite. Prefer waiting on an asyncio event or polling the queue directly to improve test reliability and speed.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used `python -c` scripts to inspect the `google.genai` library methods (`LiveConnectSession.send_realtime_input` and `types.Part`) and grepped the `gemini-live-api-examples` directory, indicating a gap in readily available knowledge documentation for the new Gemini GenAI SDK.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: `python -c "from google.genai.live import LiveConnectSession; import inspect; print(inspect.signature(LiveConnectSession.send_realtime_input))"` and subsequent grepping in `gemini-live-api-examples/gemini-live-genai-python-sdk` for `send_realtime_input`.

summary: Review passed. The backend correctly handles base64 image payloads and forwards them to Gemini API. A minor non-blocking issue was noted regarding synchronous sleep in the test. A knowledge gap regarding GenAI SDK documentation was observed.
